title: Global Risk Clocks
summary: Static speculative pressure scores for high-level risk lanes. These are not live counters, predictions, or claims of certainty.
homepageRule: Only clocks at 90 percent or above may surface on the homepage. Epstein alerts may surface only when active and before their expiry date.
evidenceRule: Use dated public signals only. Keep speculation labelled. Do not repeat the risk terminal across the page as if it is a live counter.

clocks.title: WWIII Escalation Clock
clocks.signals: Ukraine, Gaza, Iran, Taiwan, Red Sea, nuclear rhetoric, sanctions, and alliance movement.

clocks.title: AI Breakout Clock
clocks.signals: Autonomous agents, military AI, labor displacement, model jumps, and regulatory panic.

clocks.title: Surveillance State Clock
clocks.signals: Digital ID, facial recognition, censorship law, platform control, biometrics, and payment monitoring.

clocks.title: Financial Reset Clock
clocks.signals: Debt stress, bank instability, CBDC pilots, emergency central-bank action, gold movement, and bond pressure.

clocks.title: CBDC Rollout Clock
clocks.signals: Central-bank pilots, digital ID pairing, programmable-money language, and payment rails.

clocks.title: Cyber Blackout Clock
clocks.signals: Grid warnings, ransomware, banking outages, state-backed cyber alerts, and telecom fragility.

clocks.title: Alien Disclosure Clock
clocks.signals: UAP hearings, whistleblower claims, NASA/DoD statements, anomalous object reports, and scientific shifts.

clocks.title: Pandemic / Biosecurity Clock
clocks.signals: WHO alerts, bird flu, lab-leak arguments, emergency planning, contracts, and biosecurity exercises.

clocks.title: Civil Unrest Clock
clocks.signals: Elections, migration pressure, policing escalation, protests, censorship, and emergency laws.

clocks.title: Food System Stress Clock
clocks.signals: Crop failure, fertilizer stress, export bans, livestock disease, water scarcity, and price shocks.

clocks.title: Energy Shock Clock
clocks.signals: Oil chokepoints, LNG stress, refinery outages, sanctions, grid strain, and Hormuz/Red Sea pressure.

clocks.title: Machine Convergence
clocks.signals: Hidden composite index. No public explanation.
